meaning: adj.现世的,可能的,地球的,俗世的,
examples: The fay lived in groups called the faerie, between the heavenly and earthly realms.
The elder brother is issuing this theory without any consideration—obviously, whatsoever of earthly reality and we're shocked by.
There's no earthly reason why you shouldn't go.
The fabulous tombs of the Recoleta Cemetery stand as vainglorious monuments, in death, to earthly success and ambition.
The Bible describes Eden as an earthly heaven with four rivers flowing from it.
